abilities.name: Dual Aura
abilities.text: As long as you have Latias or Latias ex in play, each player's Evolved Pokemon (excluding Pokemon-ex) can't use any Poke-Bodies.

attacks.name: Aqua Blast
attacks.text: Discard a Water Energy attached to Latios.

tests.name: dual_aura_blocks_evolved_bodies
tests.description: Test that Dual Aura blocks Poke-Bodies of evolved non-ex Pokemon

tests.name: dual_aura_requires_latias
tests.description: Test that Dual Aura only activates when Latias/Latias ex is in play

tests.name: aqua_blast_discards_energy
tests.description: Test that Aqua Blast discards a Water Energy
